prerequisites: A Freshcaller account with an agent or admin login that can access Profile Settings.
Your Freshcaller account subdomain (the domain config field), for example mycompany.freshcaller.com.
An API key copied from Freshcaller Profile Settings (the api_key secret field).

authMethods.name: API key (X-Api-Auth header)
authMethods.summary: Freshcaller authenticates each request with an API key passed in the X-Api-Auth header. This maps to the connector's api_key secret field. The key is sent as a plain string with no base64 encoding. Find it in Freshcaller under the profile icon > Profile Settings > YOUR API KEY.

setupSteps.title: Retrieve your Freshcaller API key
setupSteps.body: Log in to your Freshcaller account, click the profile icon on the right, select Profile Settings, and copy the value shown under YOUR API KEY. Provide this as the api_key field.

setupSteps.title: Set your account domain
setupSteps.body: Enter your Freshcaller account subdomain in the domain field. API requests are made against https://<account-name>.freshcaller.com/api/v1/, so supply the <account-name> subdomain that matches your login URL.

setupSteps.title: Configure optional sync settings
setupSteps.body: Optionally set start_date to bound how far back data is synced, requests_per_minute to throttle calls within Freshcaller's rate limits, and sync_lag_minutes to delay reads of very recent records. Leave these unset to use connector defaults.

sources.title: How to find my API key - Freshworks Support
